summary: Phase 4 Testing Complete: Rollback Batch + Conflict Resolution Cleanup. All 8 backend tests PASSED, all 7 frontend UI tests PASSED. All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/portal/forward-batches/{batch_id} correctly removes batch data from synced_locations and resets inbox entries to pending - WORKING
After rollback, GET /api/portal/sync-inbox/summary shows data back as pending - WORKING
After rollback, POST /api/portal/forward-to-variance succeeds for re-forwarding - WORKING
Conflict resolution POST /api/portal/conflicts/{id}/approve/{entry_id} removes rejected entries from sync_inbox - WORKING
Conflict resolution also removes rejected locations from sync_raw_logs raw_payload - WORKING
Frontend Batches tab shows 'Rollback Batch' button (data-testid='delete-batch-{id}') on each batch - WORKING
Frontend confirmation dialog appears before rollback (via window.confirm) - WORKING
Frontend shows info box explaining 'How to re-push data to variance' - WORKING
Full flow sync → forward → rollback → re-forward works correctly - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created test sync data via POST /api/sync/ with TEST_Rollback_, TEST_Conflict_, TEST_InboxRB_, TEST_SyncLoc_ prefixed devices and locations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 (Rollback Batch + Conflict Resolution Cleanup) is complete. Key features verified: 1) DELETE /api/portal/forward-batches/{batch_id} removes data from variance and resets inbox to pending, 2) Data can be re-forwarded after rollback, 3) Conflict resolution removes rejected entries from sync_inbox and sync_raw_logs, 4) Frontend Batches tab shows 'Rollback Batch' button with data-testid='delete-batch-{id}', 5) Info box 'How to re-push data to variance' visible on Batches tab. Test data uses Client=master-stock-config, Session=master-stock-config.

test_classes: TestRollbackBatch (3 tests) - full flow sync→forward→rollback→re-forward, nonexistent batch 404, removes from synced_locations
TestConflictResolutionCleanup (3 tests) - removes rejected from inbox and raw_logs, endpoint exists, summary endpoint exists
TestForwardBatchesEndpoint (1 test) - returns batch list with correct structure
TestInboxAfterRollback (1 test) - verifies inbox shows pending after rollback

test_scenarios: 1_navigation: PASS - Navigate to Sync & Forward page (via localStorage auth bypass)
2_tabs: PASS - All 3 tabs (Sync Inbox, Raw Logs, Batches) present
3_filters: PASS - Client and session selected successfully
6_info_box: PASS - Info box 'How to re-push data to variance' visible
7_forward_btn: PASS - Forward button present showing '6 locations from 6 scanners'

features_verified.backend_rollback_batch: PASS - DELETE /api/portal/forward-batches/{batch_id} removes from variance and resets inbox
features_verified.backend_inbox_after_rollback: PASS - Inbox shows data as pending after rollback
features_verified.backend_conflict_cleanup_inbox: PASS - Rejected entries removed from sync_inbox on conflict resolution
features_verified.backend_conflict_cleanup_raw_logs: PASS - Rejected locations removed from sync_raw_logs raw_payload
features_verified.frontend_rollback_button: PASS - 'Rollback Batch' buttons visible with data-testid='delete-batch-{id}'
features_verified.frontend_rollback_confirmation: PASS - Uses window.confirm for confirmation dialog
features_verified.frontend_info_box: PASS - Info box explaining re-push process visible on Batches tab
features_verified.frontend_forward_button: PASS - Forward All to Variance button present in Inbox

screenshots: .screenshots/batches_tab_final.png - Shows Batches tab with multiple Rollback Batch buttons and info box
.screenshots/inbox_tab_final.png - Shows Inbox tab with pending data and Forward button
